prompt:
Men's realistic-scale variation 4 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s sitting on a wide ottoman in a sunlit modern living room, BRIGHT CLEAN DIRECT NATURAL DAYLIGHT pouring through a wall of tall windows on the right side of the frame. He leans forward casually with elbows on his knees, lifting ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his slightly parted lips with a relaxed half-smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted ecru henley, simple leather watch, brown stubble, sun-warmed glowing skin.

>>> THE JAR — LIT BY CLEAN BOUNCING DAYLIGHT <<<
The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar sits on a low light-oak coffee table in front of him in the SAME bright direct daylight. The light angle creates a SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — running down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every detail of the teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand accents reads sharply with NO shadow falloff, NO diffusion. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the coffee table. A subtle clean reflection on the wood surface. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also in the same bright direct light. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: a softly out-of-focus bright modern living room — a creamy linen sofa, a fluffy beige rug, a tall potted plant, soft white wall, wall of tall windows on the right pouring in bright open daylight. Bright airy real-photograph feel. NOT moody, NOT golden-hour, NOT dappled.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT from the right wrapping BOTH the jar AND the man uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off both subject's skin and the jar's glossy plastic. NO heavy dappled shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood — just clean bright real daylight.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man seated, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, small realistic-sized jar visible in the lower-third with bright specular highlight clearly visible on its curved side.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, sharp focus on jar with clean specular reflections, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers. Editorial men's wellness-brand feel.
